name: The studio look-inside gallery opens a lightbox and navigates
description: On a studio detail page, clicking a look-inside tile opens a lightbox that shows a caption and position and can move to the next image and close.

planSteps.description: Open the Signal Podcast Booth studio from the gallery
Scroll to the 'Look inside' section and click the first gallery tile
Verify a lightbox opens showing a caption such as 'Broadcast desk' and a position like '1 / 4'
Click the next arrow inside the lightbox
Verify the lightbox caption changes to the next tile (for example 'Isolation')
Close the lightbox using its close button
Verify the lightbox is no longer visible and the studio page is shown again
